name: Glorified Hash
directions: Crumble hash in casserole or 9x9-inch pan and sprinkle with cheese.
Combine the flour, salt, nutmeg, pepper, mustard, egg, and milk; pour over the corned beef mixture.
Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until the custard is set; partially cool.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Garlic Pizza
directions: Allow pizza dough to be in the refrigerator for at least one day so it will be defrosted.
Allow pizza dough to sit out for 30 minutes.
Combine margarine, 2 tbsp. parmesan cheese and garlic powder.
Brush margarine mixture onto pizza dough using a pastry brush, allow for about 1 inch for crust.
(all of it will not be used--you will have extra!).
Sprinkle w/extra parmesan cheese, if desired.
Bake at 400 degrees F for 10 minutes or until cooked through.

similar.name: Calzones of Tomato, Mozzarella and Basil

name: Daddy's Favorite Pizza
directions: Place pizza dough on pizza stone.
Cover with desired amount of sauce, spices toppings then cheese.
Bake at 300°F until cheese is melted and bubbly around edges.

name: Pizza Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 375 dgrees.
Spread softened cream cheese on bottom of 13" x 9" pan.
Top with pizza sauce, pepperoni and cheese.
Bake until cheese is bubbly.

name: Delicious Party Cheese Potatoes
directions: Thaw potatoes overnight in refrigerator.
Preheat oven to 350.
Melt butter.
Add soup, cheese, and sour cream to butter.
Mix well.
Add potatoes, salt and pepper.
Mix well.
Spray 9x13 glass pan with non stick cooking spray.
Add potatoe mixture.
Cook uncovered for 30 to 45 minutes.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Cheesy Potato Lasagna
directions: Heat oven to 400 degrees.
Peel and wash potatoes.
Cut into slices that are approximately 1/8" thick (like potato chips).
Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Heat canola oil and fry potato slices until they are slightly brown.
Drain.
Cut onions into slices and brown in oil.
In an 8" casserole dish, layer the ingredients in the following order: potatoes, 1/2 cup of cheddar, 1/2 cup of mozzerella, parmesan cheese, onions, salt, pepper.
Repeat until all ingredients are gone.
Top with a sprinkle of cheddar cheese.
Bake, uncovered for 20 minutes.

name: Hutchinson Fruit Dip
directions: Beat softened cream cheese and milk.
Add remaining ingredients and beat.
If necessary, add more milk to make a good dipping consistency.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Fresh Fruit Dipping Crème
directions: In a food processor, blend until smooth all ingredients EXCEPT whipping cream.
Transfer mixture from the food processor to a mixing bowl and reserve.
In a separate bowl whip cream until a soft peak and fold into cream cheese mixture.
Chill and serve with fresh fruit.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Hawaiian Pizza
directions: Toast muffin halves and spread with yogurt.
Spoon strawberries on muffin halves.
Sprinkle with crushed pineapple.
Eat and enjoy!

similar.name: Calzones of Tomato, Mozzarella and Basil

name: Trevor's Fresh  Onion Dip
directions: Place all ingredients except onion in a large bowl.
Peel onion.
Grate onion into cream cheese mixture. Add as much as you think you will need (depends on strength of onion).
With a hand blender, mix all till well blended.
Taste, adjust seasonings. (you may want more onion, Worcestershire sauce, etc.).
Add more milk if necessary to bring to your desired "dipability".

name: Easy Deep Dish Pizza
directions: Preheat oven to 425.
Grease lasagne pan. Cook and stir sausage and onion in skillet til sausage is brown.
Drain.
Mix baking mix and water til moist.
Spread in pan.
Pour spaghetti sauce carefully over batter.
Top with sausage, onions, shrooms, and cheese.
Bake 25-30 minutes.
Check in the middle to see if crust is cooked.

name: Last-Minute Lasagna
directions: Heat oven to 350°F
Spoon 1/3 of the pasta sauce into a 9x13 baking dish.
Place 1/2 the ravioli over sauce in a single layer.
Top with another 1/3 of the pasta sauce.
Sprinkle with spinach and 1/2 the mozzarella.
Add the remaining ravioli in a single layer (you may not need them all).
Top with remaining sauce and cheeses.
Cover with foil and bake 25 minutes.
Uncover and bake until bubbling, about 5-10 minutes.

name: Pumpkin/Peanut Butter Dip
directions: Combine all of the ingredients above.
Cut apples, bananas and other fruit into bite-sized pieces to serve with the dip. Serve as a snack or with a meal.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Nacho Bake
directions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Prepare dinner following basic directions.
While pasta is cooking, brown meat; drain.
Add taco seasoning mix and water to the meat; simmer 5 minute.
Stir sour cream into prepared dinner.
Spoon half of the dinner mixture into 8-inch square baking dish; top with layers of the meat mixture, half of the cheese and the remaining dinner mixture. Cover.
Bake 15 minutes; top with salsa, remaining cheese and the crushed tortilla chips.
Bake, uncovered, an additional 5 minutes.

name: Hot Ziggities
directions: Grind together wieners, mustard, & egg.
Prepare dough by cutting shortening with sifted flour to pea size.
Sprinkle ketchup mixture over dough & combine lightly with fork.
Roll dough to 2 12x9-inch rectangles.  Cut each into 4 6x4.5-inch rectangles.
Heat oven to 425°.
Divide meat mixture evenly onto pastry rectangles.  Fold into triangles, sealing with a little water & fork.
Place on ungreased cookie sheet & bake 15 to 20 minutes.
Serve HOT!

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Pizza Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
Spray a 13x9x2 inch pan with nonstick spray and line with biscuits.
Brown ground beef & drain.
Add everything down to spices; pour over biscuits.
Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top.
Bake 25-30 minutes until biscuits are done and cheese is melted and bubbly.

similar.name: Calzones of Tomato, Mozzarella and Basil

name: Calzones of Tomato, Mozzarella and Basil
directions: Preheat the oven to 400°F.

Brush each pastry sheet with olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Spread the roasted garlic puree onto each sheet. Lay tomatoes and mozzarella slices onto each sheet. Season with Italian seasoning and 1/2 the basil.
Brush edges with an egg wash, and fold over to a triangle shape. Seal edges with fork tines. Cut 3 small slits in top to allow steam to vent.
Brush tops with remaining egg wash, then sprinkle tops with parmesan cheese. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the cheese starts to bubble and brown.
Garnish with sprinkles of fresh basil and a side dish of the tomato sauce.

name: Mexican Lasagna
directions: Layer half of the tortillas on the bottom of a lightly greased 13 x 9 baking dish.
In a large bowl, combine ground beef, salsa, tomato sauce, and taco seasoning. Layer half of this mixture on the tortillas.
In another bowl, combine cottage cheese, beaten eggs, and oregano. Layer over the meat mixture.
Spread remaining meat mixture on top.
Layer remaining tortilla quarters over the meat mixture.
Sprinkle with mozzarella and bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.

name: One Step Fruit Dip
directions: Blend ingredients together until smooth, cool the mixture then serve.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Cream Cheese Salsa Dip
directions: Unwrap cream cheese on serving dish.
Pour salsa over cheese.
Dip  in!

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)
directions: beat cream cheese and mascarpone with milk until fluffy.
add sugar and continue to beat (taste and add more as needed).
add yogurt, lemon and almond extract, beat some more until smooth and the consistency you like, add more milk if you need to. it should be fairly thick and fluffy, not too runny.
serve over fruit salad or as a dip.

name: Peanut Butter-Honey Dip
directions: Place peanut butter in a small bowl and then gradually stir in milk and honey until blended.
Stir in apple juice and cinnamon until mixture is smooth.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Ortega's Tater Tot Nachos
directions: Follow directions on taco seasoning packet to prepare beef (add onion to beef); drain fat and hold warm while heating up remaining ingredients.
Deep fry tater tots according to package directions; drain.
Meanwhile heat refried beans until hot.

When ready to assemble, place tater tots on a large platter and top with taco meat, refried beans, cheddar cheese then top with lettuce. Sprinkle tomatoes and green onions on top. Serve immediately with sour cream and salsa.
Enjoy this great comfort food!

name: Pizza Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Place all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.  Transfer to an oven-proof baking dish.
Bake for approximately 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.

name: Quick and Easy Dip
directions: In a bowl, mix all ingredients until uniform consistence.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Chili Pie Pizza
directions: Roll crescent rolls out to cover regular size pizza pan. Spread chili over dough and bake at 350 degrees for about 12 minutes until crust is just starting to brown. Add corn chips and cheese, bake until crust is brown and cheese melted. Top with shredded lettuce, tomatoe and onion. Serve with sour cream.

similar.name: Calzones of Tomato, Mozzarella and Basil

name: Cold Pizza Dip
directions: beat cream cheese in bowl until creamy.
chop pepperoni and tomatoes finally.
add all spices and pepperoni and tomatoes into the cream cheese.
mix at med high speed until thoroughly combined.
serve with crackers corn chips pretzels or even on bagles.

name: Strawberry Dipper (Dipping Sauce)
directions: In a small saucepan over low heat melt the preserves.
Add cream cheese; stir until smooth.
Remove from heat; stir in low-fat yogurt and onion soup mix.
Refrigerate for 30 minutes or up to 3 days.
Serve slightly chilled.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: 2-Ingredient Italian Veggie Dip
directions: Mix .7 oz packet of salad dressing mix with sour cream. (The recipe builder changes the size of the packet to 2/3 oz., which I can't fix.).
Chill for at least two hours (I have served it when chilled less time, but the longer you chill it the more time it has for the flavors to meld.).
Serve with fresh cut up vegetables.  I like to serve it with broccoli, sweet red peppers, green peppers, carrots, celery, grape tomatoes.  You get the idea! :-).

name: Popular French Onion Dip
directions: in a coffee grinder grind boulion cubes into power. In a coffe cup take boulion, dried onion and garlic with just enough water to cover. microwave 15 - 30 seconds till soft, mix with sour cream, mayo and chives.
Chill til ready to serve with chips or veggies.

similar.name: Yummy Dip (For Fruit, Graham Crackers, Etc)

name: Simple Italian Nachos
directions: Heat alfredo sauce and marinara sauce separately in the microwave until just hot.
Spread chips on a microwave safe dinner plate or platter.
Pour alfredo sauce evenly over chips, then top with smaller dollops of marinara sauce.
Sprinkle shredded cheese on top and microwave for approximately one minute.

name: Cheesy Hashbrowns
directions: Mix together sour cream & soup. Add salt, pepper, onion, cheese, & margarine. Add hash browns, making sure they are broken up. Put in a greased 9 x 13 pan (I use a glass pan). If you wish, mix 2 cups crushed corn flakes and 1/4 Celsius melted margarine and put on top of potatoes. Bake 1 hour in 350 oven.

name: Peppy Dip
directions: in a mixing bowl beat cream cheese til creamy.
add everything else and chill 1 hour.
